Fiction.title: To Kill a Mockingbird
Fiction.author: Harper Lee
Fiction.description: The unforgettable novel of a childhood in a sleepy Southern town and the crisis of conscience that rocked it.

Fiction.title: The Great Gatsby
Fiction.author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
Fiction.description: A brilliant exploration of the lavish Jazz Age and the illusions of the tragic American Dream.

Fiction.title: Pride and Prejudice
Fiction.author: Jane Austen
Fiction.description: The classic romantic comedy dealing with manners, societal judgments, and unexpected real attachments.

Fiction.title: Normal People
Fiction.author: Sally Rooney
Fiction.description: An intimate exploration of the complex, changing relationship dynamics between two high school classmates.

Fantasy.title: The Hobbit
Fantasy.author: J.R.R. Tolkien
Fantasy.description: A magnificent fantasy adventure detailing Bilbo Baggins' unexpected quest to reclaim a lost kingdom.

Fantasy.title: The Name of the Wind
Fantasy.author: Patrick Rothfuss
Fantasy.description: The riveting autobiographical account of a notoriously gifted young wizard growing into a legend.

Fantasy.title: The Way of Kings
Fantasy.author: Brandon Sanderson
Fantasy.description: An epic, sweeping world-building saga tracking fragmented soldiers enduring a harsh world of storms.

Fantasy.title: A Game of Thrones
Fantasy.author: George R.R. Martin
Fantasy.description: Noble houses navigate dangerous political maneuvers, betrayal, and magic to seize control of a kingdom.

Adventure.title: Treasure Island
Adventure.author: Robert Louis Stevenson
Adventure.description: An old sailor's map triggers a thrilling high-seas journey searching for buried pirate gold.

Adventure.title: Life of Pi
Adventure.author: Yann Martel
Adventure.description: An extraordinary survival story of a boy stranded on a solitary lifeboat with a Bengal tiger.

Adventure.title: The Call of the Wild
Adventure.author: Jack London
Adventure.description: A domesticated dog must discover his raw inner wild instincts to survive the brutal Klondike Gold Rush.

Adventure.title: Into Thin Air
Adventure.author: Jon Krakauer
Adventure.description: A harrowing true account documenting a deadly storm system overtaking an expedition on Mt. Everest.

Mystery.title: Sherlock Holmes: A Study in Scarlet
Mystery.author: Arthur Conan Doyle
Mystery.description: The legendary introductory tale that brings Detective Sherlock Holmes and Dr. John Watson together.

Mystery.title: Murder on the Orient Express
Mystery.author: Agatha Christie
Mystery.description: An elegant train journey comes to a sudden halt when a brutal midnight murder puzzle locks in passengers.

Mystery.title: The Girl with the Dragon Tattoo
Mystery.author: Stieg Larsson
Mystery.description: A dark, intricate tech mystery involving a missing heiress and a brilliant, reclusive punk hacker.

Mystery.title: Gone Girl
Mystery.author: Gillian Flynn
Mystery.description: A gripping psychological thriller examining a marriage gone wrong under the media spotlight.

Sci-Fi.title: Dune
Sci-Fi.author: Frank Herbert
Sci-Fi.description: Set on the desert planet Arrakis, a mystical young man navigates political betrayals over a priceless spice.

Sci-Fi.title: Neuromancer
Sci-Fi.author: William Gibson
Sci-Fi.description: The foundational cyberpunk matrix masterpiece about a washed-up computer hacker hired for a final run.

Sci-Fi.title: Project Hail Mary
Sci-Fi.author: Andy Weir
Sci-Fi.description: A solitary astronaut awakens from a coma to solve an interstellar threat threatening Earth's survival.

Sci-Fi.title: The Martian
Sci-Fi.author: Andy Weir
Sci-Fi.description: Stranded on Mars, a resourceful engineer must use basic science and sheer grit to message rescue crews.
